input.title: capture-log: raise the git subprocess maxBuffer
input.head: claude/claudinite-phase-2-mount-ya0hoo
input.body:
`spawnSync`'s default 1 MiB `maxBuffer` truncates `git show` of the prior capture once a session's log tops it — the delta pass then throws (an ENOBUFS wrapped in the git-helper error, whose message dumps the partial blob) and a long session can never append its capture. Hit live running the post-#387 capture against this session's 1702-entry log; with the raised cap the 740-entry delta captured cleanly.

Left unmerged for review.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01LD1cVQD1a2LZvGwtm3JoA4

content.text:
Done. **#387 squash-merged** as `0120f19` (CI was green on the final head), local canon `main` synced — phases 2 and 3 are both landed; the transition surface is gone from the canon.

The post-merge conversation capture then surfaced a real bug: `capture-log.mjs` reads the prior capture blob via `git show` under `spawnSync`'s default 1 MiB `maxBuffer`, and this session's earlier 1702-entry capture now exceeds that — the delta pass died with a buffer overflow dressed up as a `git show` failure. I raised the cap to 256 MiB, after which the capture ran cleanly (`captured 740 entries (delta since 15:28) → 2026-07-21T2336Z--issue-385--….jsonl` on `conversation-logs`).

That one-line fix is up as **[PR #388](https://github.com/missingbulb/Claudinite/pull/388)** — left unmerged for you, per your standing instruction. Issue #385 was already closed from the earlier merge, so nothing else is pending: the only open items are #388 and the per-repo Setup-script re-pastes you'll do as you touch each repo.

content.subject: Simplify the required consumer .gitignore
content.description: Reduce the consumer .gitignore contract to the minimum (hook-log lines only), updating bootstrap.md, the flip note, mount/DESIGN.md, and EdFringeNow's .gitignore; document the transition trade-off (a stale environment's stray sync becomes visible untracked noise instead of hidden).

content.subject: Resolve the CI conformance stub question (item 2)
content.description: User believes claudinite-checks-ci.yml is a nightly action and wants it gone. It's actually the per-PR/push conformance backstop the design added deliberately. Surface the fact, ask remove-vs-keep, then apply to canon (baseline stub + flip note) and EdFringeNow.

content.subject: Minimize the root CLAUDE.md corpus index
content.description: The vendored CLAUDE.md reads like a README explaining Claudinite's architecture. Strip it to the few lines Claude actually needs in-context; relocate the explanatory map to README.md/docs for maintainers. Check no check/doc depends on the removed text.

content.subject: Consolidate the engine under engine/ (hooks, loaders, check_the_world/work, helpers, mount)
content.description: Relocate packs/registry.mjs, load-active-prose.mjs, env.mjs, interview.mjs to core/pack_loader/; update all imports, MACHINERY_ROOTS/ENGINE_DIR_ROOTS, session-start.sh, mount-skills dynamic import, docs, tests; run repo-text-sweeps discipline.

content.subject: Re-vendor EdFringeNow from the changed canon and push
content.description: After canon changes land on the branch: re-run apply-vendor against EdFringeNow, apply the simplified .gitignore, CI-stub decision, clean legacy leftovers in the container, run the sweep, commit and push (rides PR #73). Also answer user's item 4 (convergence deletes removed files — yes) in the report.

content.subject: Move skills into their owning packs, drop pack.skills key + skill-ownership check
content.description: git mv each skills/<s> into packs/<owner>/skills/<s> (canon) or .claudinite/local_packs/canon-curation/skills/ (the two curation skills); bundled skills = the dir listing so the pack.mjs skills key goes away; mount-skills walks active packs' skills dirs; vendor.mjs drops the union+extraSkills; delete skill-ownership; update catalog + catalog-completeness + all references.

content.subject: Drop empty rules/accept boilerplate from declarations
content.description: --init seeds only { packs, maintenance }; EdFringeNow's .claudinite-checks.json loses its empty "rules"/"accept" keys; confirm loadConfig defaults cover absence.

content.subject: Rename delivery "auto" → "auto-merge"; stop-command router; phase-3 retirement ledger; re-vendor EdFringeNow
content.description: Stop wiring routes via stable engine/hooks/stop-command.mjs (done in tree); maintenance.delivery canonical value becomes auto-merge (aliases auto/push/pr); consolidate the full phase-3 retirement checklist into engine/mount/DESIGN.md; commit+push canon; re-vendor EdFringeNow with new settings value and Stop command; push.

content.subject: Merge both PRs per "lgtm on both"
content.description: Gate Claudinite #384 on CI (nullglob fix pushed as 3a87a20), squash-merge #384 then EdFringeNow #73, sync local mains, run capture-log (--issue 385 canon, --issue 72 EdFringeNow), close issues #385 and #72 as completed.

content.subject: Finalize phase 2 (vendored mount) across the whole fleet
content.description: Add all other missingbulb repos, determine each repo's mount state (pre-flip / half-flipped / flipped / non-member), run the vendored-mount conversion per the flip note on every covered member, widen canon flip.repos to 'fleet', open the Setup-script re-paste issue per converted member.

content.subject: Execute phase 3: retire the transition surface (PR only, no merge)
content.description: Delete the 8-item retirement ledger from vendoring/DESIGN.md: legacy sync script, bootstrap transition appendix + worker pre-flip branch, flip note, mount-folder-relocation note, four shims + engine-restructure note, mount-skills legacy owned-roots, signals legacy regexes, consumer-safe-changes rewrite. Update tests/docs, keep suite+sweep green, push branch, open PR, DO NOT merge.
